failedAssertions.reason: Request with unknown model 'nonexistent-model-xyz' returns HTTP 500 with 'Authentication required' error, not HTTP 400 with model not found error. The auth failure is occurring before model validation.

Proxy shows 'authenticated' in /health even when cursor-agent status shows 'Not logged in'. The auth detection fallback incorrectly returns true when cli-config.json exists, even though it contains no access token - only user settings.
cli-config.json does not contain an access token field - only user settings (permissions, editor, model, etc.). Token is stored internally by cursor-agent and not accessible to the proxy.

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Cannot test quota exceeded without triggering real API usage limits
Cannot make cursor-agent unauthenticated without breaking test environment
